title: Investigate a pest control failure
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Investigate a pest control failure demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess planning techniques used

pcs.text: Determine and assess management techniques used in pest management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and assess management techniques used in pest management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and assess management techniques used in pest management plan.

pcs.text: Assess level of community and stakeholder engagement for development of the pest management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess level of community and stakeholder engagement for development of the pest management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess level of community and stakeholder engagement for development of the pest management plan.

pcs.text: Evaluate the level of commitment gained from stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate the level of commitment gained from stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate the level of commitment gained from stakeholders.

pcs.text: Assess validity of defined pest problem
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess validity of defined pest problem?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess validity of defined pest problem.

pcs.text: Assess stakeholder understanding of pest and damage caused
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess stakeholder understanding of pest and damage caused?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess stakeholder understanding of pest and damage caused.

pcs.text: Determine and assess suitability of monitoring techniques used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and assess suitability of monitoring techniques used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and assess suitability of monitoring techniques used.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess planning techniques used

elements.title: Assess treatment failure

pcs.text: Assess level of pest damage subsequent to treatment according to expectations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess level of pest damage subsequent to treatment according to expectations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess level of pest damage subsequent to treatment according to expectations.

pcs.text: Review pest management records and conduct site inspections to determine pre-treatment and post-treatment infestation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review pest management records and conduct site inspections to determine pre-treatment and post-treatment infestation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review pest management records and conduct site inspections to determine pre-treatment and post-treatment infestation.

pcs.text: Review pest management plan to determine expected pest population size post-treatment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review pest management plan to determine expected pest population size post-treatment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review pest management plan to determine expected pest population size post-treatment.

pcs.text: Assess the difference between expected and monitored population levels
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the difference between expected and monitored population levels?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the difference between expected and monitored population levels.

pcs.text: Assess treatments and application techniques used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess treatments and application techniques used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess treatments and application techniques used.

pcs.text: Determine if failure was due to defective treatment or pest response to treatment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine if failure was due to defective treatment or pest response to treatment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine if failure was due to defective treatment or pest response to treatment.

pcs.text: Determine if operator skill level contributed to failure when applying pest treatment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine if operator skill level contributed to failure when applying pest treatment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine if operator skill level contributed to failure when applying pest treatment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assess treatment failure

elements.title: Evaluate solutions to the failure

pcs.text: Consolidate and analyse all treatment failures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consolidate and analyse all treatment failures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consolidate and analyse all treatment failures.

pcs.text: Identify alternative treatment solutions to rectify failures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify alternative treatment solutions to rectify failures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify alternative treatment solutions to rectify failures.

pcs.text: Determine best treatment solutions to resolve failures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine best treatment solutions to resolve failures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine best treatment solutions to resolve failures.

pcs.text: Review and revise pest management plans and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and revise pest management plans and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and revise pest management plans and procedures.

pcs.text: Advise stakeholders of changes to pest management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Advise stakeholders of changes to pest management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Advise stakeholders of changes to pest management plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Evaluate solutions to the failure

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
